rationale: Educ. Code §11.059 governs school board trustee term lengths and election schedules. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.059. TERMS. (a) A trustee of an independent school district serves a term of three or four years.
_note: Rule text concerns trustee governance only; no provision touches homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
